detail: Started durable CD remediation to remove self-hosted docker daemon dependency.
Updated deploy-apps job to replace local docker login/build/push with az acr build and added preflight checks for ACR+infra outputs.
Feature-branch workflow dispatch failed at azure/login due to federated credential subject restricted to refs/heads/main.
Promote change to main via PR and verify CD on main where OIDC subject is authorized.
Updated CI trigger to PR lifecycle events and CD trigger to merged PR closed event on main only; removed workflow_dispatch gates.
Enhanced runner bootstrap to install persistent toolchain (az, terraform, node/npm, docker, git, jq, unzip) and fixed runner-user/docker-group ordering.
Added NAT gateway + public IP association to workload subnet for reliable outbound internet from runner subnet path.
